issues.detail: The instructions lack error handling and edge case considerations.
The code uses Node-specific APIs (process.env, Blob) limiting compatibility with non-Node agents.

scenarios.name: Upload NFT image and metadata via Pinata
scenarios.rationale: Treatment hits pinFileToIPFS for the image and pinJSONToIPFS for the metadata with Bearer JWT, extracts IpfsHash and returns ipfs:// URIs; baseline often uses ipfs-http-client or a single endpoint and skips the ipfs:// scheme.

scenarios.name: Fetch JSON from IPFS via gateway
scenarios.rationale: Treatment fetches from a documented gateway (gateway.pinata.cloud/ipfs/<cid>) and parses res.json(); baseline often uses a local ipfs daemon or non-listed endpoints.
